text_preview:
Implementation Plan Based on Existing System 

1. Geolocation Enablement 

•  Add Geolocation fields (latitude and longitude) to both Appointment and Staff objects 

• 

if not already present. 
Implement a geocoding process to convert address, city, and zip fields into coordinates 
for: 

o  New appointments 
o  All staff records 

•  Use an external geocoding service (e.g. Google Maps API) via Apex callout, or a 

middleware integration if preferred. 

2. Staff Proximity Matching 

•  Develop an Apex utility or service that: 

o  Accepts an appointment address (via geolocation) 
o  Retrieves all active staff with valid coordinates 
o  Calculates the distance between the appointment location and each staff address 
o  Returns a list of staff sorted by proximity 

• 

Integrate this logic into the appointment creation flow or screen, so the system can: 

o  Display the nearest staff to select 
o  Or automatically assign the nearest available staff if business rules allow 

3. Nearest to First Appointment Logic 

•  On creation of a subsequent appointment, implement logic to: 

o  Retrieve the address of the first appointment 
o  Geocode it if needed 
o  Use the same proximity logic to find the nearest staff to that address 
•  Optionally, pass the first appointment ID into a custom screen or flow to drive the 

matching logic 

4. Staff Availability Check 

•  Define availability by checking if a staff member is already booked during the requested 

time. 

•  Use a SOQL query against the Appointment object to check for overlapping times: 

o 

If the requested start/end time overlaps with any existing appointment for that 
staff, they are not available 

• 

Integrate this availability check into the proximity logic: 

o  First filter staff by availability 
o  Then sort the available staff by distance 

 
 
 5. Integration into Appointment Creation Process 

•  Modify the existing appointment creation process (Flow, screen component, or custom 

form) to: 

o  Trigger the geocoding and proximity logic when address is entered 
o  Perform availability check for the given time 
o  Suggest or auto-fill the nearest available staff in the lookup field 

6. Optional Enhancements 

•  Add visual indicators (e.g. distance, availability status) next to each staff in the selection 

screen 

•  Log or report auto-assignment logic for audit or review 

7. Testing and Validation 

•  Test proximity calculation with real and edge-case addresses 
•  Validate availability filtering with back-to-back and overlapping appointments 
•  Ensure performance is acceptable for bulk or concurrent usage 

8. Deployment 

•  Build and test changes in a sandbox 
•  Review with business users 
•  Deploy via change set or metadata API to production 
•  Train relevant users on the new selection behavior 

Timeline:  60-100 hours. 
Hourly Cost: $30
